titleStmt.title: SII 24.243: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 243. (A.R. No. 37 of 1936-37.) SAME WALL.

summary.p: Registers the assignment of the 5 vēli of land referred to in the previous record to the bhaṭṭas of the agaram on the same day specified in the previous record.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
tulyam tribhuvanaccakravattikaḷ koṉerimel koṇṭāṉ tiruvaraṅkaṉ tiruppatiyil nam perāl vaitta Akaram Iravivarmmacaturvedimaṅkalattu bhaṭṭarkaḷukku taṅkaḷukku bhāgam nūṟṟoṉpatum
Ivvakarattu nām Eḻuntaruḷivitta nāyaṉār Iravi nārāyaṇap perumāḷukku bhāgam pattum pala vṛttikaḷukku bhāgam Añcum Āka bhāgam nūṟṟirupattu nālukkum munnāḷ taṅkaḷ perāl Irā[ja*]rā[ja*]va
ḷanāṭṭuk kiḻaimuṟiyil Iṭaiyāṟṟu nāṭṭu Iṭaiyāṟṟu maṅkalattu sabhaiyār pakkal Ivvūr vaṭapiṭākaiyil muṉṉāḷ taṅkaḷ perāl vilaikoṇṭa pramāṇappaṭi nila muppatiṟṟu ve
liyil Iraṇṭāvatu Etirāmāṇṭu mutal taṅkaḷukku Iṟaiyiliyāka nam Ōlaippaṭiyil Iṉnilam Irupattai Aiveli nikki nilam Aiveliyum Innilattāl varum samasta prāptikaḷum
bhāgamum bhāgāśrayamum U m neṟkaṭamai kātti mā vaṭai puṉpayir Ā
ya vaṟkam Uṭppaṭṭa Aṉaittāyavaṟkamum Uṭpaṭa nāṉkāvatu kārmutalukku Aṟpaci māta mutal bhūtāṉa Iṟai kkalum kaḻikka Ippaṭikku Ivvo
lai piṭi pāṭākak koṇṭu cantirātittavarai cellak kallilum cempilum veṭṭik koḷka pāṇṭi maṇṭalattu melai Iraṇiyamuṭṭa nāṭṭu veṭciyūruṭaiyāṉ tiruvālavāyuṭai
yāṉThe last line is a palimpsest.Eḻuttu § Ivai cuntarapāṇṭiyak kāliṅkarāyaṉ Eḻuttu § yāṇṭu nālāvatu ḷ 100 10 4 §
Digital edition of SII 24.243 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
